name: DDoS Attack Detected
notes: Reports network Denial of Service (DoS) attacks on a system.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: DDoS Attack Events with the same QID more than 3 times
conditions_text: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: DDoS Attack Events with the same QID more than 3 times, across exactly 1 destination IP within 5 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: DDoS Attack Events with the same QID more than 3 times, across exactly 1 destination IP within 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY DDoS Attack Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: DDoS Attack Events with the same QID more than 3 times, across exactly 1 destination IP within 5 minutes
RED_list: Event description: The system has identified a DDoS Attack
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Destination IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
